_note: Each entry in 'periods' applies from its effective_from date until the day before the NEXT period's effective_from (or forever, if it's the last one). When tariffs change each year (typically April), ADD A NEW PERIOD with a new effective_from date — do NOT edit an existing period's schedule/tariffs, or historical billing for past periods will be recalculated retroactively with the new rates. Hour ranges are [start, end) in 24h format, where start is inclusive and end is exclusive. day_type: weekday/saturday/sunday. season: 'high' (winter, Jun-Aug) or 'low' (rest of year). Periods must be listed with effective_from in ascending order, though the code will sort them regardless.
